adventure.title: Combat Arena
adventure.introduction: A proving ground for combat mechanics. You stand in a dusty sand-floored arena beside your ally Korbar. Four enemies block the northern corridor: a goblin grunt, a skittish goblin runner, a goblin shaman, and a thick-skinned bugbear. Fight your way through.

arena.name: The Arena
arena.description: A circular sand-floored arena ringed by cracked stone walls. A narrow corridor leads north, but four enemies stand between you and the exit: a goblin grunt with a rusty shortsword, a skittish goblin runner clutching javelins, a hunched goblin shaman rattling bone fetishes, and a hulking bugbear hefting a morningstar. Korbar stands at your side, warhammer ready.

corridor.name: Exit Corridor
corridor.description: A narrow stone corridor leading out of the arena. The sounds of combat fade behind you.

longsword.name: Longsword
longsword.description: A standard steel longsword, well-balanced and sharp.

health_potion.name: Healing Potion
health_potion.description: A vial of crimson liquid that heals 2d4+2 HP when drunk. Drink it when badly hurt.

korbar.name: Korbar
korbar.description: A stocky dwarf warrior with a braided beard and a battered warhammer. She fights at your side.

dialogue.guidelines: Stoic, loyal, and battle-hardened. Speaks in short sentences. Already allied with the player.

goblin_grunt.name: Goblin Grunt
goblin_grunt.description: A scrawny goblin wielding a rusty shortsword. The baseline melee threat.

goblin_runner.name: Goblin Runner
goblin_runner.description: A nimble goblin scout clutching javelins. Looks skittish and likely to bolt when hurt.

goblin_shaman.name: Goblin Shaman
goblin_shaman.description: A hunched goblin in bone regalia, clutching a feathered fetish. It can heal its allies with a whispered incantation, but only every few rounds.

bugbear.name: Bugbear
bugbear.description: A hulking bugbear with thick, leathery hide. It shrugs off piercing weapons but is vulnerable to fire. Its morningstar hits hard.

flame_strike.name: Flame Strike
flame_strike.description: You call down a column of roaring fire on a target. The target must make a DEX save, taking 2d6 fire damage on a failed save or half on a successful one. Particularly effective against fire-vulnerable foes like the bugbear.

mend_wounds.name: Mend Wounds
mend_wounds.description: The shaman knits flesh with a whispered incantation, healing the most-injured ally for 2d4+2 HP.
